title: cullumia aculeata var. aculeata
intro: Cullumia aculeata var. aculeata, also known as the thorny cullumia or prickly cullumia, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with thorny stems and small, white or purple flowers. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
